review.notes: The draft is factually accurate against the OCR. Dave Tomlinson (ex-Sockeyes) is mentioned as a goal-scorer and appears in the photo caption, making this archive-worthy. Byline confirmed as "By NEIL HODGE" in the OCR. No headline text is discernible in the OCR beyond the publication/page metadata, so leaving headline blank is correct. All key facts — 5-0 score, Fisher and Gernander with two goals each, Tomlinson's goal, Beauregard's 130:21 shutout streak, 3-2 series lead — are confirmed by the OCR.
